Hunter Goodman Total RBIs Props • Colorado

COL @ SD
H. Goodman
catcher C • Colorado

Projection Rating

When it comes to his home run ability, Hunter Goodman ranks in the 94th percentile according to the leading projection system (THE BAT X). Hunter Goodman is penciled in 3rd in the batting order today. On average, the fence height at Petco Park is the lowest among all major league baseball stadiums. The weather report expects the 3rd-most favorable hitting weather on the slate today, as it relates to temperature and humidity. Hunter Goodman has big-time HR ability (94th percentile) if he makes contact, but that's always far from assured (29.3% K%). Today, however, opposing pitcher Randy Vasquez is a pitch-to-contact type (17th percentile K%) — great news for Goodman.

As it relates to his home run skill, Mickey Moniak ranks in the 90th percentile according to the leading projection system (THE BAT X). Mickey Moniak is projected to hit 2nd in the batting order in this matchup. On average, the fence height at Petco Park is the lowest among all major league baseball stadiums. The weather report expects the 3rd-most favorable hitting weather on the slate today, as it relates to temperature and humidity. Hitting from the opposite that Randy Vasquez throws from, Mickey Moniak will have an advantage today.

Projection Rating

The leading projection system (THE BAT X) projects Brenton Doyle in the 76th percentile as it relates to his home run talent. On average, the fence height at Petco Park is the lowest among all major league baseball stadiums. The weather report expects the 3rd-most favorable hitting weather on the slate today, as it relates to temperature and humidity. Brenton Doyle has big-time HR ability (76th percentile) if he makes contact, but that's never a guarantee (29.3% K%). Today, however, opposing pitcher Randy Vasquez doesn't generate many whiffs (17th percentile K%) — great news for Doyle. Brenton Doyle hits a lot of his flyballs to center field (38.6% — 90th percentile) and is a great match for the park considering he'll be hitting towards baseball's 2nd-shallowest CF fences in today's game.

Brenton Doyle

The leading projection system (THE BAT X) projects Brenton Doyle in the 75th percentile as it relates to his BABIP ability. The weather report expects the 3rd-most favorable hitting weather on the slate today, as it relates to temperature and humidity. Brenton Doyle hits a lot of his flyballs to center field (38.6% — 90th percentile) and is a great match for the park considering he'll be hitting towards baseball's 2nd-shallowest CF fences in today's game. In terms of his wOBA and overall offense, Brenton Doyle has had some very poor luck since the start of last season. His .276 rate falls considerably below the leading projection system (THE BAT X)'s version of Statcast-based Expected wOBA (xwOBA) at .307.

How is Value calculated?

Our value picks are based on the Expected Value (EV) of placing the bet, using our projections and the current odds price:

0-2 Stars: Negative to Even EV
3-4 Stars: Positive EV
5 Stars: Highest EV
